description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a dark brown wooden top and matching lower shelf, supported by black side panels. The desk features a pull-out keyboard tray beneath the main surface, which is visible from the front and rear views. The left side of the desk includes an open storage compartment, while the right side is enclosed by a solid black panel. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a sturdy appearance, suitable for both professional and home environments. The materials appear to be a combination of wood or wood veneer and engineered wood or laminate for the black structural elements. The finish is smooth and slightly glossy, giving the desk a polished and contemporary look.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a dark brown wooden top, black side panels, a pull-out keyboard tray, and an open storage compartment on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, pull-out keyboard tray, and open storage compartment on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid black panel and the thickness of the wooden top.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the keyboard tray and the open shelf beneath the desk surface.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid black panel and no visible storage or openings.
attribute_orientation: The side with the pull-out keyboard tray and open storage compartment is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk.
